features.name: Ranger's Companion
features.description: The companion’s hit points equal your character level or the maximum hit points for its normal form, whichever is higher. The beast obeys commands as best it can and takes actions on your turn unless commanded to do so by you verbally. You use an action to command the beast to take any action (Dodge, Dash, Disengage, or Attack). While traveling with your favored terrain, the beast moves at its normal speed without penalty and can stealthily move through that terrain. If the beast dies, you can obtain another one by spending 8 hours bonding with a hostile beast of the same type or a different kind.

features.name: Bestial Fury
features.description: Your companion can make attacks as if it had two Attacks. It can use this feature when commanded to take the Attack action.

features.name: Share Spells
features.description: Beginning at 15th level, when you cast a spell that targets only yourself, you can choose a creature your companion can see within 30 feet of you to be affected by the spell as if it were targeted by the spell.
